title: Uruguayan Skillet Steak with Crispy Potatoes
description: A hearty Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring pan-seared steak and crispy potatoes, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Steak (1.5 lbs)
ingredients.notes: Look for a high-quality cut such as flank steak or skirt steak.

instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the steak with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
3. Add a tablespoon of olive oil to the preheated skillet and sear the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
4. Remove the steak from the skillet and set it aside to rest.
5. Add the remaining tablespoon of olive oil to the skillet and add the sliced potatoes.
6. Sprinkle the garlic powder and skillet salt over the potatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
7. Slice the rested steak against the grain and serve with the crispy potatoes.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
